title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
ticket_summary: Review STIG control V-100001: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
description: Check: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence. Fix: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; GPO, registry, or Local Security Policy export; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes

title: Firewall management access must be restricted
ticket_summary: Review STIG control V-100004: Firewall management access must be restricted
description: Check: Review firewall management network restrictions. Fix: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Network device configuration excerpt or management console export; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes
